prerequisites: An Open Exchange Rates account. Register at https://openexchangerates.org/signup to receive an App ID (the Free plan provides daily historical data and 1,000 API requests per month).
Your App ID. This hexadecimal token is emailed to you on registration and is also available anytime in your Account Dashboard.
A start date in YYYY-MM-DD format from which to begin pulling historical exchange rates (the historical endpoint requires this date format).

authMethods.name: App ID
authMethods.summary: Open Exchange Rates uses App ID authentication. Set the connector's app_id field to the hexadecimal App ID from your account; the connector passes it to the API via the app_id query parameter, which is the authentication method the API supports.

setupSteps.title: Create an account and get your App ID
setupSteps.body: Sign up at https://openexchangerates.org/signup. Your App ID is sent to you by email on registration and is available at any time in your Account Dashboard. The App ID is a hexadecimal token your team uses to request data from the API.

setupSteps.title: Set the App ID credential
setupSteps.body: Enter your App ID in the required, secret app_id field. The connector authenticates by sending this value as the app_id query parameter on each API request.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide start_date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The connector uses this as the earliest date for historical exchange-rate requests, which the API serves from https://openexchangerates.org/api/historical/:date.json (date required in YYYY-MM-DD format).

setupSteps.title: Optionally set the base currency
setupSteps.body: Optionally set base to a 3-letter currency code to change the base currency for returned rates. If left empty, the API default of USD is used.
